title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Central Industrial Security Force Act, 1968. (2) It extends to the whole of India. (3) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 10th March, 1969, vide notification No. S.O. 924, dated 3rd March, 1969, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
